---
title: "Reveal.js-typed Example"
format:
  revealjs: default
revealjs-plugins:
  - RevealjsTyped
---

# Reveal.js Typed Demo

## Regular Slide

- No typing effect here
- Just normal content

## Typed Slide 1

::: {.typed data-typed-speed="20" data-typed-reset-on-slide-change="true"}
- Hello World!
- ~~Do you like this?~~
- This is a typing **BOLD** effect!
:::

## Typed Slide 2

::: {.typed data-typed-speed="10" data-typed-fade-out="true"}
- Hello World!
- ~~Do you like this?~~
- This is a **BOLD** effect!
:::

## More content

- You can reuse `data-typed` on any slide element
- Add `data-typed-reset-on-slide-change="true"` to restart when revisiting the slide

TODO [TR-5] Update the presentation
